debug_info.goal:
a✝ : GamePos
bt : BuildTree a✝
φ : Formula
π : PreState a✝ bt
⊢ φ ∈ PreState.forms a✝ bt π → φ.basic = true ∧ φ ∈ PreState.last a✝ bt π ∨ sorry

failed_attempts:
intro h
  by_cases hb : φ.basic
  · left; exact ⟨hb, h⟩
  · right; exact hb

intro h
  simp only [PreState.forms, PreState.last, PreStateP.forms] at *
  cases π <;> simp_all
  · rename_i p
    have : p.forms = let ⟨L,R,_⟩ := p.last; L ++ R := rfl
    rw [this] at h
    by_cases hb : φ.basic <;> simp [hb, h]
  · rename_i p
    have : p.forms = let ⟨L,R,_⟩ := p.last; L ++ R := rfl
    rw [this] at h
    by_cases hb : φ.basic <;> simp [hb, h]

intro
  by_cases h : φ.basic
  · left
    exact ⟨h, sorry⟩
  · right
    exact sorry

rcases def_last : π.last with ⟨L, R, _⟩
  rw [def_last] at h
  simp only [List.mem_append] at h
  if hbas : φ.basic then
    left
    constructor
    · exact hbas
    · -- Assuming Sequent membership includes L and R parts
      rw [def_last]
      simp only [Sequent.mem_def] -- This lemma likely exists to define membership
      tauto
  else
    right
    exact hbas
